setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added basic test coverage for UnitTest1 class with constructor and method tests
recommendations: Implement meaningful logic in Test1() method
Consider adding parameters or return values to Test1()
fileReports.note: Current test class has minimal implementation and requires additional business logic to enhance testability

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection for ILogger to replace Console.WriteLine
Implement more robust error handling and logging
Add integration tests with actual Kafka broker for more comprehensive testing
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as a placeholder Kafka broker. Replace with actual configuration in real-world scenarios.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, exception handling, and disposal behavior.
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception scenarios
Implement a more robust error handling strategy in readMessage()
Add optional CancellationToken support to readMessage() method
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer and FluentAssertions for assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, enum values, and initialization scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for quantity and productname
Implement custom validation logic for business rules
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property meanings
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Tested edge cases like null product names and negative quantities
fileReports.note: Tests assume no strict validation rules exist in the current model implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, serialization, and producer interaction
recommendations: Consider adding more robust input validation
Implement more detailed error handling in ProducerWrapper
fileReports.note: Tests require ProducerWrapper and ProducerConfig to be mockable
